items: Command palette (⌘K / Ctrl+K) for navigation and search
First-run checklist, help & accessibility pages, and changelog
Manuscript and Idea Web export to Markdown; Word import preview
Offline idea queue, connectivity banner, and multi-tab conflict notice
Write view reading mode, focus mode, and save status
Sprint timer now saves session history
Novel cards now show arc progress rings
Codex panel can be pinned as a persistent sidebar
Settings has a dedicated AI tab
